targets.query:
from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "load")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "solar_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value < 0.0 then 0.0 else r._value}))

from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "wind_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> last()

panels.description: Renewable + battery discharge - battery charge - load. Positive = net export.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "solar_power" or r["_field"] == "wind_power"
      or r["_field"] == "load" or r["_field"] == "battery_discharge"
      or r["_field"] == "battery_charge")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value:
      (if float(v: r.solar_power) > 0.0 then float(v: r.solar_power) else 0.0)
      + (if float(v: r.wind_power) > 0.0 then float(v: r.wind_power) else 0.0)
      + (if exists r.battery_discharge then float(v: r.battery_discharge) else 0.0)
      - (if exists r.battery_charge then float(v: r.battery_charge) else 0.0)
      - float(v: r.load)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

panels.title: Live Net Power (kW)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: -2h, stop: 2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_load_series")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: -2h, stop: 2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_solar_series")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: -2h, stop: 2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_wind_series")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: -2h, stop: 2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_total_renewable_series")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> last()

actual = from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "load")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> set(key: "series_name", value: "Actual Load")

forecast = from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_load_series")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> set(key: "series_name", value: "Forecast Load")

union(tables: [actual, forecast])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "series_name"])
  |> group(columns: ["series_name"])

union(tables: [actual, forecast])

  |> group(columns: ["series_name"])

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "wind_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> set(key: "series_name", value: "Actual Wind")

forecast = from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_wind_series")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")

union(tables: [actual, forecast])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "series_name"])
  |> group(columns: ["series_name"])

from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_load_series" or r["_measurement"] == "forecast_solar_series" or r["_measurement"] == "forecast_wind_series" or r["_measurement"] == "forecast_total_renewable_series")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_measurement"])

actual = from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "solar_power" or r["_field"] == "wind_power"
      or r["_field"] == "battery_discharge" or r["_field"] == "battery_charge")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time,
      _value: float(v: r.solar_power)
        + float(v: r.wind_power)
        + (if exists r.battery_discharge then float(v: r.battery_discharge) else 0.0)
        - (if exists r.battery_charge then float(v: r.battery_charge) else 0.0),
      series_name: "Actual Renewable + Battery"}))

forecast = from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_total_renewable_series")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> set(key: "series_name", value: "Forecast Renewable (no battery)")

union(tables: [actual, forecast])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "series_name"])
  |> group(columns: ["series_name"])

panels.description: Green = actual grid pull after battery. Blue = portion of deficit covered by battery discharge. Orange = forecast grid pull (no battery model — upper bound).

targets.query:
raw = from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "solar_power" or r["_field"] == "wind_power"
      or r["_field"] == "load" or r["_field"] == "battery_discharge")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

actual_grid = raw
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      batt_d  = if exists r.battery_discharge then float(v: r.battery_discharge) else 0.0
      solar   = if float(v: r.solar_power) > 0.0 then float(v: r.solar_power) else 0.0
      wind    = if float(v: r.wind_power)  > 0.0 then float(v: r.wind_power)  else 0.0
      deficit = float(v: r.load) - solar - wind
      grid    = if deficit - batt_d > 0.0 then deficit - batt_d else 0.0
      return {_time: r._time, _value: grid, series_name: "Actual Grid Pull"}
  })

actual_batt = raw
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      batt_d  = if exists r.battery_discharge then float(v: r.battery_discharge) else 0.0
      solar   = if float(v: r.solar_power) > 0.0 then float(v: r.solar_power) else 0.0
      wind    = if float(v: r.wind_power)  > 0.0 then float(v: r.wind_power)  else 0.0
      deficit = float(v: r.load) - solar - wind
      batt_contrib = if deficit > 0.0 then
          (if batt_d < deficit then batt_d else deficit)
        else 0.0
      return {_time: r._time, _value: batt_contrib, series_name: "Battery Contribution"}
  })

forecast_gp = from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_grid_pull_series")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> set(key: "series_name", value: "Forecast Grid Pull")

union(tables: [actual_grid, actual_batt, forecast_gp])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "series_name"])
  |> group(columns: ["series_name"])

panels.title: Grid Pull vs Battery Contribution: Actual vs Forecast (kW)

panels.description: Positive = net surplus. Battery discharge adds to supply; charge subtracts.

from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "solar_power" or r["_field"] == "wind_power"
      or r["_field"] == "load" or r["_field"] == "battery_discharge"
      or r["_field"] == "battery_charge")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value:
      float(v: r.solar_power)
      + float(v: r.wind_power)
      + (if exists r.battery_discharge then float(v: r.battery_discharge) else 0.0)
      - (if exists r.battery_charge then float(v: r.battery_charge) else 0.0)
      - float(v: r.load)}))

panels.title: Net Power History: Renewable + Battery minus Load (kW)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_charge")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_discharge")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> last()
  |> group()

panels.description: Positive = charging, Negative = discharging. Derived from forecast_renewable - forecast_load.

targets.query:
load_f = from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: -2h, stop: 2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_load_series")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

gen_f = from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: -2h, stop: 2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_total_renewable_series")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

join(tables: {load: load_f, gen: gen_f}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time,
      _value: if r._value_gen - r._value_load > 2000.0 then 2000.0
        else if r._value_gen - r._value_load < -2000.0 then -2000.0
        else r._value_gen - r._value_load}))
  |> last()

panels.title: Next Hour Battery Net Forecast (kW)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, series_name: "Battery SOC"}))
  |> group(columns: ["series_name"])

panels.description: Forecast Net = forecast_renewable - forecast_load. Positive = expected charging, negative = expected discharging.

targets.query:
actual_charge = from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_charge")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, series_name: "Actual Charge"}))

actual_discharge = from(bucket: "simulations")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_discharge")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "powersim3.0")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: -1.0 * r._value, series_name: "Actual Discharge"}))

load_f = from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_load_series")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

gen_f = from(bucket: "forecast")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "forecast_total_renewable_series")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["model"] == "live_combined_v1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["horizon"] == "1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "PredictedValue")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false, timeSrc: "_start")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

forecast_net = join(tables: {load: load_f, gen: gen_f}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time,
      _value: if r._value_gen - r._value_load > 2000.0 then 2000.0
        else if r._value_gen - r._value_load < -2000.0 then -2000.0
        else r._value_gen - r._value_load,
      series_name: "Forecast Net"}))

union(tables: [actual_charge, actual_discharge, forecast_net])
  |> group(columns: ["series_name"])

panels.title: Battery Charge/Discharge: Actual vs Forecast Net (kW)
